creator: renchap@cocoa-x.com
text:
This will break sysutils/rubygem-ohai, which has the following dep :
systemu ~> 2.2.0 (from http://rubygems.org/gems/ohai)

ohai devs are working on a new version which will depend on a more
recent systemu version, but not released yet.

Le Wed, 8 Feb 2012 02:34:37 GMT,
pgollucci@FreeBSD.org a =C3=A9crit :

> Synopsis: [PATCH] devel/rubygem-systemu: update to 2.3.0
>=20
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: ruby->pgollucci
> Responsible-Changed-By: pgollucci
> Responsible-Changed-When: Wed Feb 8 02:34:36 UTC 2012
> Responsible-Changed-Why:=20
> I will take it.
>=20
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D164892
